---
applyTo: "README.md,docs/**/*.md,.github/**/*.md"
---

Documentation requirements:

- Document verified behavior only.
- Keep Windows, Linux, Docker, and TrueNAS guidance aligned when relevant.
- Prefer concise operational steps over narrative explanations.
- If commands are shown, make them copyable and current.
- Keep `.github` orchestration docs consistent with the actual agent roster and contracts.

Do not describe features that are not implemented.
